# Exercises the precedence rules: longest pattern wins, ties go to allow.

User-agent: *
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /blog/
Allow: /blog/public/
Disallow: /downloads/*.pdf$
Allow: /downloads/brochure.pdf$
Disallow: /search?
Crawl-delay: 2

# A more specific group wins outright over the catch-all above.
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Disallow: /private/
